Pipeline by Stage — click a row to expand —

ⓘ All values use Annual Contract Value (ACV). Bars are stacked against the largest stage total in the selected period. Closed Lost is shown separately below so lost renewals don't count against live pipeline signal.

Closed Lost — renewals that did not close —

Renewal Teams — YTD (Jan–)
Team tiles populate from RM_ROSTER + RM_TARGETS + TEAM_YTD on refresh.
Two measures shown. The $ amount is closed-won ACV for the active period by close date, displayed against annual 2026 quota — measures booking activity. The %, bucket, and pace gap use closed-won ACV for the active period by effective start date, against the period quota — measures whether revenue is landing on the right cadence. When the filter is set to All, the period is YTD (Jan–) and the period quota is the YTD-month quota. Team rollups follow the rollup-math rule (manager rows ARE the team total).
RM Pacing — YTD (Jan–)
RM bucket grid populates from RM_ROSTER + RM_TARGETS + RM_YTD on refresh.
$ vs. % use different numerators. Big $ = close-date closed-won for the active period (against annual quota). % bucket = effective-start-date closed-won for the active period (against the period's quota). When the filter is set to All, the period is YTD. Buckets: On / Ahead (≥100%) · Approaching (70–99%) · Behind (51–69%) · At risk (≤50%). Manager rows show as ICs with an "(individual)" suffix and ALSO contribute to their team's tile rollup above. Adj. rem = annual quota − close-date YTD ACV.

Pricing Summary —

Open Renewals to Price — click any row to expand reference detail; enter term, price, or uplift % to price the deal —

ⓘ Term toggle picks 1 / 2 / 3 years. Annual price is what you charge per year. Total contract value is shown next to it. Uplift % auto-calculates from prior closed-won ACV — type either value and the other syncs. Decisions save to your browser. Click "Export Pricing Decisions" to download a JSON file for Salesforce import.
Month: Up to 3 months
Team:
RM:

Churn Signals by RM — click any row to see the deals —

ⓘ Signal counts show how many opps each RM has flagged across the three categories (🔴 health · ⚠️ at-risk/DNR · ⛔ suspended). Total ACV is deduped — each opp counts once even if it shows multiple signals. Closed Won / Closed Lost opps are excluded (see CHANGELOG S18 for rationale).
